vector_table.evidence: The 68EC020 architecture defines vectors 0-255 as 32-bit big-endian entries at VBR 0; all entries are retained as typed board data rather than an opaque byte range.

startup_memory_test.evidence: 0x402 loads the complete four-entry descriptor table. The boot routine first probes, then writes/verifies walking byte patterns, and finally clears each 32-bit hardware window.

fields.label: Screen Y position
fields.evidence: 2,001-frame structure trace: down/up input changes this 16.16 value by the configured cardinal or diagonal speed

fields.label: Screen X position
fields.evidence: 2,001-frame structure trace: right/left input changes this 16.16 value by the configured cardinal or diagonal speed

fields.label: Cardinal Y speed
fields.evidence: directional replay holds 2.0 while cardinal Y movement advances position_y by 2 pixels per frame

fields.label: Cardinal X speed
fields.evidence: directional replay holds 2.0 while cardinal X movement advances position_x by 2 pixels per frame

fields.label: Diagonal Y speed
fields.evidence: directional replay holds 1.5 and diagonal movement uses this component for position_y

fields.label: Diagonal X speed
fields.evidence: directional replay holds 1.5 and diagonal movement uses this component for position_x

fields.label: Active frame counter
fields.evidence: 2,001-frame structure trace initializes at zero and advances once per active player frame

fields.label: Player score
fields.evidence: gameplay trace transitions 0 to 2500 to 7500 at the corresponding enemy-score awards

fields.label: Remaining lives
fields.evidence: P1/P2 replay differential and life-loss/continue transitions

fields.label: Movement and collision profile
fields.evidence: six single-character traces select profile 0..4 and reproduce each character's speed and collision parameter row

fields.label: Bomb stock
fields.evidence: P1/P2 bomb-use replay differential

fields.label: Primary shot power
fields.evidence: P1/P2 power-up replay differential

fields.label: Local collision minimum Y
fields.evidence: all six character traces satisfy world_min_y = integer(position_y) + collision_min_y

fields.label: Local collision minimum X
fields.evidence: all six character traces satisfy world_min_x = integer(position_x) + collision_min_x

fields.label: Local collision maximum Y
fields.evidence: all six character traces satisfy world_max_y = integer(position_y) + collision_max_y

fields.label: Local collision maximum X
fields.evidence: all six character traces satisfy world_max_x = integer(position_x) + collision_max_x

fields.label: World collision minimum Y
fields.evidence: directional trace follows integer(position_y) plus the character-specific local minimum

fields.label: World collision minimum X
fields.evidence: directional trace follows integer(position_x) plus the character-specific local minimum

fields.label: World collision maximum Y
fields.evidence: directional trace follows integer(position_y) plus the character-specific local maximum

fields.label: World collision maximum X
fields.evidence: directional trace follows integer(position_x) plus the character-specific local maximum

fields.label: Invincibility timer
fields.evidence: P1/P2 hit and respawn replay differential

fields.label: Secondary weapon power
fields.evidence: P1/P2 secondary-weapon replay differential

fields.label: Object logic state
fields.evidence: 5,000-frame two-player write trace observes state-machine values 1, 2, 5 and 6 across all eight slots

fields.label: Animation state bits
fields.evidence: write trace observes staged values 1, 2, 4, 8, 16 and 0x100 at the animation dispatcher writers

fields.label: Per-player slot status
fields.evidence: player parameter initialization clears four 56-byte slots per player; two-player trace verifies all eight instances

fields.label: Startup timer
fields.evidence: object construction writes 20 before the first active update

fields.label: Trajectory duration parameter
fields.evidence: object construction copies character-table values 4 or 6 and the trajectory update subtracts this value from the global phase

fields.label: Trajectory step parameter
fields.evidence: object construction copies character-table values 2 or 3 from the validated parameter record

fields.label: Spawn base Y
fields.evidence: object construction copies signed character-table values -26 or -21 before initial trajectory projection

fields.label: Spawn base X
fields.evidence: object construction copies signed character-table values -8 or -9 before initial trajectory projection

fields.label: Trajectory base Y
fields.evidence: the validated object-position block adds the signed vector-table Y component to this field

fields.label: Trajectory base X
fields.evidence: the validated object-position block adds the signed vector-table X component to this field

fields.label: Object screen Y position
fields.evidence: 5,000-frame trace records 7,562 fixed-point Y projections from vector_base_y and the active trajectory table

fields.label: Object screen X position
fields.evidence: 5,000-frame trace records 7,562 fixed-point X projections from vector_base_x and the active trajectory table

fields.label: Sprite object code
fields.evidence: eight-slot initialization assigns the observed sprite codes 0xe5 through 0xee

fields.label: Animation descriptor ROM address
fields.evidence: eight-slot initialization selects ROM descriptor tables 0x0a044a or 0x0a050a

fields.label: Animation frame timer
fields.evidence: trace observes countdown sequences followed by reloads from animation_period

fields.label: Animation frame period
fields.evidence: animation descriptor loaders copy periods 2 or 4 into this field

fields.label: Animation frame index
fields.evidence: trace observes deterministic increments and wrap-to-zero at the descriptor frame count

fields.label: Animation frame count
fields.evidence: descriptor loaders copy observed counts 4, 5 or 6 before the frame-index comparison

fields.label: Animation frame-data ROM address
fields.evidence: descriptor loaders and refresh block select verified ROM frame tables in the 0x06b2f0-0x06b644 range

fields.label: Owning player index
fields.evidence: eight-slot allocation writes player indices 0 and 1 to four consecutive slots each

fields.label: Per-player slot index
fields.evidence: eight-slot allocation writes slot indices 0 through 3 for each owning player

fields.label: Render callback ROM address
fields.evidence: pool allocation installs 0x1336 and the render dispatcher invokes the address as a callback

fields.label: Render zoom axis 0
fields.evidence: pool allocation clears the byte and the scaled renderer consumes it

fields.label: Render zoom axis 1
fields.evidence: pool allocation clears the byte and the scaled renderer consumes it

fields.label: Render flags
fields.evidence: pool initialization and release write 0x80; allocation alternates bit 0x10

fields.label: Render grouping byte
fields.evidence: pool allocation clears the byte; render ordering and player-object registration read/write it

fields.label: Runtime object state
fields.evidence: pool allocation writes state 1, release writes 0, and typed callbacks advance the byte through observed states 2, 4, 6, 7, 8, 9 and 10

fields.label: Render auxiliary state
fields.evidence: pool allocation clears the word before the runtime callback is assigned

fields.label: Free runtime sprite index
fields.evidence: pool initialization writes identity sequence 0..255; acquire pops and release pushes indices

globals.label: Software reset request
globals.evidence: reset-path replay reaches the ROM RESET instruction only when asserted

globals.label: Ayin selection unlock
globals.evidence: character-select replay exposes Ayin only when asserted

globals.label: Runtime sprite free-list top
globals.evidence: initialized to 255, decremented on allocation and incremented on release

globals.label: Runtime sprite allocation pair toggle
globals.evidence: allocation alternates zero/one and mirrors bit 0x10 in render flags

globals.label: Runtime sprite pool ready flag
globals.evidence: pool initialization writes one after all 256 free slots are seeded

globals.label: Hardware sprite-list terminator
globals.evidence: pool initialization writes 0xffff before rendering begins
